goals: Confirm `backend/vendor/comfy-diffusion` is at `v1.1.0` and all its tests pass (or failures are documented).
Fix the one breaking change in the ReelPod backend caused by the `load_clip` signature change.
Verify the ReelPod backend still loads correctly after the fix.

userStories.title: vendor/comfy-diffusion is updated to v1.1.0
userStories.description: As a developer, I want `backend/vendor/comfy-diffusion` to be at `v1.1.0` so that LLM/VLM capabilities (and all other new modules) are available for future iterations.

acceptanceCriteria.text: `cd backend/vendor/comfy-diffusion && uv run python -c "import comfy_diffusion; print(comfy_diffusion.check_runtime())"` exits without error.

userStories.title: comfy-diffusion pytest suite passes
userStories.description: As a developer, I want the full `uv run pytest` suite in `comfy-diffusion` to pass (or all failures to be explained) so that I know no regressions were introduced.

acceptanceCriteria.text: `cd backend/vendor/comfy-diffusion && uv run pytest` reports at most the one known environmental
All other tests pass (baseline: 269 passing before this story is considered done).

userStories.title: Fix ReelPod backend `load_clip` call to use new variadic signature
userStories.description: As a developer, I want `audio_repository.py` to call `load_clip` using the new `*paths` variadic signature so that the backend does not crash on startup after the comfy-diffusion update.

acceptanceCriteria.text: `backend/repositories/audio_repository.py` no longer passes `path2=` as a keyword argument.
The call passes both encoder paths as positional args when `text_encoder_2_name` is set, and a
`cd backend && uv run python -c "from repositories.audio_repository import build_pipeline"` imports without error.

functionalRequirements.description: `ModelManager.load_clip(*paths, clip_type=...)` MUST be called with positional paths — `path2=` keyword is no longer valid.
No other ReelPod backend files require changes from this update.
